name: SMTP Mail
description: Generic SMTP email provider, contributed into mail:provider — sandboxed. The isolate has no TCP sockets, so it hands the (non-secret) transport config + message to the host `smtp` capability, which sends via nodemailer; the SMTP password stays host-side.

settings.label: Secure (TLS)
settings.help: 'true' for implicit TLS; defaults to true on port 465.

secrets.label: Password
secrets.help: SMTP auth password; read host-side by the smtp capability, never seen by the plugin.
